title: Palamod Reloaded
description: An updated version of the Palamod!
body:
# This mod is an unofficial port
All the textures and the assets are from a Modded PVP Server: https://paladium-pvp.fr
The original mod was make for the server, my mod is just a re-creation on MCreator for playing in singleplayer.

# What the mod adds?
It adds principaly the main features of the 1.7.10 Palamod: Paladium ore, Green Paladium ore, Endium ore, Amethyst ore, Titane ore, Findium ore, Trixium...
![The Paladium Stuff](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/2d0JZyas/images/5984954b625eff76a24a4c9f6f90a9121b07ab19.png)

It also add Cave Blocks, the invisibility when you wear the complete Endium Armor, and the Paladium Lucky Block with 2 events: Consolation and Palapilone.

# What will be the next updates?
I will add more event in the Lucky Block, add more Lucky Blocks and more if join my Discord! https://discord.gg/7yXRx6yVVy
